calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar Oct-16-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Justin Mallory, esq. (925-256-4460) of Ginn & Crosby for Petitioner/Moving party CHINESE HOSPITAL ASSOCIATION.
No other appearances.

ARGUED re: attorney's fees. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER CHINESE HOSPITAL ASSOCIATION's Petition For Release Of Property From Mechanics Lien is Taken Under Submission. Petitioner submits proposed order for court to review re: attorney's fees. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar Sep-28-2017 Continued To Oct-11-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CHINESE HOSPITAL ASSOCIATION's Petition For Release Of Property From Mechanics Lien is Continued to October 11, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to department 501 no later than October 2, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
